name: 撕毀/展示物品（打臉用證據）
description: 女主逐一拿出為每個家人準備的禮物作為證據，證明自己的付出，然後指出身上穿的是20美元舊衣。物品作為「鐵證」讓反派無法狡辯。
tags: 一件件物品的展示形成遞進式的視覺敘事，最後的廉價衣服形成反差衝擊

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: This is soothing incense. I prayed for you after climbing 8,000 steps up the temple path. ... I woke up at 4 in the morning to personally cook this mixed grain porridge for you. ... As for the clothes I'm wearing, they are just $20 thrift store items.
examples.context: 一件件物品的展示形成遞進式的視覺敘事，最後的廉價衣服形成反差衝擊
